name: Anti-Mage
description: They who live by the wand shall die by my blade.

abilities.name: Persecutor
abilities.description: The anti-arcanist applies a movement speed slow based on the affected enemy unit's current mana missing. The higher Anti-Mage's level, the greater the applied movement speed slow.

abilities.name: Mana Break
abilities.description: The first attack after Blink applies an on-hit undispellable debuff on the first attacked enemy unit that prevents all mana restore and mana regeneration. The first successful hit after Anti-Mage Blinks additionally deals a bonus max mana as mana burn.

abilities.name: Blink
abilities.description: Grants Anti-Mage a buff upon cast. The first attack after Blink applies an on-hit undispellable debuff on the first attacked enemy unit that prevents all mana restore and mana regeneration.

abilities.name: Counterspell
abilities.description: Passively grants Anti-Mage bonus magic resistance. Creates a blinked fragment of Anti-Mage next to the enemy caster upon reflecting their unit-targeted spell while active.

abilities.name: Mana Void
abilities.description: Deals damage within the radius, based on per point of missing mana of the unit-targeted enemy. Stuns the primary unit-targeted enemy for a short duration.
